text.title: seven-performance-domains Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for seven-performance-domains as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM output contains "Integration Management" or "Quality Management" as a domain name.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These are PMBoK 6 terms; in PMBoK 8 they are integrated. Any output containing these names is anchored to the wrong edition and must be rejected.

failure-mode.description: Agent output lists eight domains (adding Quality or Communications as a standalone).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Validate output length == 7 domains. An 8th domain signals PMBoK 6 training bias; reject and re-prompt with the canonical seven in the system prompt.

failure-mode.description: Domain status colours drift to "green" over time without human sampling.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents self-validate by confirming artefact existence, not artefact quality. Calibrate by sampling 1 in 5 domains for human review each cycle.
